file: 1125_Feng 等 - 2020 - TEOS-modified NiZSM-5 nanosheet catalysts for hydroconversion of oleic acid to high-performance avi.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床流动反应器中，使用不同Si/Al比和TEOS化学液相沉积(CLD)改性的Ni/ZSM-5纳米片催化剂，在不同反应温度(240°C, 250°C, 260°C)和氢气压力(4.0 bar, 10 bar, 30 bar)下，催化油酸加氢转化为航空燃料范围烷烃(AFRAs)。该过程包含脱氧(加氢脱氧HDO、脱羰DCO、脱羧DCO2)、裂解和异构化等多个子反应。
experiments.text_snippet: The catalytic hydroconversion of oleic acid to AFRAs over the Ni/ZSM-5 nanosheet catalysts (pellet size of 30–40 mesh) was carried out with a fixed-bed flow reactor... The reaction temperature was controlled... Oleic acid was dissolved in cyclohexane to get a 33.3wt% solution as the feedstock and injected into the reactor at a flow of 0.40 mL/min... The catalytic hydroconversion of oleic acid to AFRAs over the pristine and CLD modified Ni/ZSM-5 nanosheet catalysts was carried out at 260°C and 30 bar... was carried out using NS200(1) as catalyst at 240°C, 250°C, and 260°C... was investigated at 250°C and at 4.0, 10, and 30 bar.

Catalyst composition.original: Ni (10 wt%) supported on ZSM-5 nanosheet zeolites with different Si/Al ratios (100, 200, 300) modified by chemical liquid deposition (CLD) of tetraethoxysilane (TEOS)

Product Selectivity.original: AFRA selectivity: 51.4% (250°C, 10 bar); HDO selectivity: decreased with increasing temperature; DCO/DCO2 selectivity: increased with increasing temperature; iso/n-alkanes ratio: 1.7 (250°C, 10 bar over NS200(1))

Catalyst stability.original: Well-maintained structure with slight Ni sintering and coke deposition (0.8 wt%) after 240 min reaction at 250°C and 30 bar
